name: Wall Sconce with Rechargeable LED Bulb and Remote Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Add elegant lighting to your space with the Wall Sconce with Rechargeable LED Bulb and Remote from Room Essentials™. This black wall sconce features a cone-shaped pleated shade with a metal base for a standout look that elevates the feel of any space. The dimmable design lets you adjust the lighting to your liking with the included remote, and this cordless wall sconce also easily turns on and off with the push of a button.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
